message:
feat(share): add static HTML pre-rendering pipeline (br-3vwi.13.5)

Add static_render module that generates deterministic pre-rendered HTML
pages, navigation structures, search index, and sitemap from exported
SQLite databases. Supports GitHub Pages and Cloudflare Pages hosting
with no runtime server dependencies. 21 tests including determinism
verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
